title: One paper is accepted by VLSI 2026
description: Congratulations to Mingxuan. We will present a 22nm reasoning LLM accelerator chip with reinforcement fine-tuning features.

title: Two papers are accepted by DAC 2026
description: Congratulations to Zhantong and Chenhao. We will present AgenticDSE: a multi-agent design space exploration framework for chiplet accelerators.

title: Two papers are accepted by ISSCC 2026
description: Congratulations to Jiaqi and Wenjie. We will present two AI accelerator chips for visual content generation and multi-speaker ASR tasks.

title: Two papers are accepted by DATE 2026
description: Congratulations to Kangbo and Hongou (senior-year undergrad). We will present our chiplet-level architecture modeling and explorations for agentic LLM and optical interconnects.

title: ISLPED 2025 Best Paper Award
description: GenSoC is a methodology exploration to leverage multi-agent LLMs for agile SoC design leveraging open-source hardware.

title: Three papers are accepted by ICCAD 2025
description: Congratulations to Siyuan and Wenjie. We will present both near-memory (3D-based and LPDDR-based) and in-memory (SRAM-based) acceleration solutions with co-optimization considerations with algorithm, thermal, and testing.

title: One paper is accepted by VLSI 2025
description: Congratulations to Yanchi. We will present a distributed power management solution with learning capability for AI processor.

title: Three papers are accepted by DAC 2025
description: Congratulations to Kangbo, Yiyang and Wentao. Three accelerator designs for Multimodal LLM, 3D Gaussian Splatting, and LLM inference with 3D stacked memory.

title: One paper is accepted by DATE 2025
description: Congratulations to Zhantong (senior-year undergrad). We demonstrate CIM has great efficiency benefits for the generative model inference in TPU architecture.

title: One paper is accepted by ISSCC 2025
description: Congratulations to Yiqi. A Diffusion accelerator with efficient compute-in-memory for multi-purpose content generation will be presented.

title: Two papers are accepted by ICCAD 2024
description: Congratulations to Yanchi. A power modeling and analysis framework for LLM chiplets and a SoC thermal optimization solution will be presented.

title: One paper is accepted by ESSERC 2024
description: Congratulations to Yiqi. A NeRF-SLAM processor with unified inference/training compute-in-memory will be presented.
